node.text: This is the developer menu. It gives you access to useful tools in Expo Go.
You can shake your device to get back to it at any time.

node.content-desc: home-world-cup-games-focus home-compact-retail-feed World Cup matches live prediction-only-home visible-5-of-5
event-card-retail-outcome-rail odds-api-single-soccer-test home-card-regulation-market Argentina Switzerland Draw
